title: CAREER DEVELOPMENT AND SKILLS ASSESSMENT WORKSHOP - 211info
text: CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO CAREER DEVELOPMENT AND SKILLS ASSESSMENT WORKSHOP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Agency offers help to prepare for interviews, build a resume, and provides educational and preparation courses such as: OSHA Training, Employee Rights, General Educational Diploma (GED), Pre-GED, English as a Second Language (ESL), Computer Literacy, and other courses designed to increase 'employability' in a local industry. Participants attend a Career Development & Skills Assessment workshop, which helps people recognize their strength, talents, and capacities; identify what works and doesn't work in a job for them. 265 SE Oak Street Suite A Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Class times vary, call for information. Email (503) 336-9895 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 336-9895 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County, with priority for City of Hillsboro residents SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located one block from Hillsboro Central / SE 3rd Ave Transit Center MAX Blue line, and TriMet bus lines: 46, 47, 48, 57 Services: Career Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT BASIC EDUCATION, JOB SEARCH, AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT EMPLOYMENT - JOB SEARCH AND EMPLOYEE DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO
